methodology: National insider sweep (Schefter/Rapoport/Pelissero/Garafolo/Breer/Fowler/King/Schultz) plus team-beat writers. Strict date filter: reports filed 4/19 or 4/20 only. Prior-week rumors excluded unless an insider explicitly re-reported them inside the window.

insider_reports.summary: 'Growing chatter' Cardinals could take Notre Dame RB Jeremiyah Love at No. 3 overall. Arizona has had exploratory trade-down calls but will take Love if they hold.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Bump ARI P(Love @ 3) materially; cap ARI trade_down_rate — exploratory not advanced.

insider_reports.summary: If Love is off the board at 3, Titans could target Ohio State LB Sonny Styles at No. 4.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Raise TEN P(Styles @ 4 | Love gone); de-emphasize Bailey to TEN.

insider_reports.summary: If Jets take Bailey @ 2, Cardinals take Love @ 3, Titans take Styles @ 4, Ohio State EDGE Arvell Reese could slide to No. 5 (NYG).
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Build conditional slide branch: P(Reese to NYG @ 5) elevated in Bailey-NYJ path.

insider_reports.summary: Browns taking calls on the No. 6 pick and are open to moving it. GM Andrew Berry public-framed as 'maximizing the asset' — trade down, trade up, or trade for a veteran all live.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: CLE trade_down_rate already 0.70; hold; flag BOTH trade-down AND trade-up as live. Add veteran-acquisition branch.

insider_reports.summary: Aaron Rodgers has not informed Steelers whether he'll play in 2026; if no answer by Thursday, PIT will internally discuss Ty Simpson at No. 21.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Keep PIT QB branch contingent on Rodgers; Ty Simpson @ 21 is live, not dominant.

insider_reports.summary: Steelers LT Broderick Jones suffered a neck-injury setback (post spinal fusion); re-examined this week. Could push Pittsburgh to draft a LT on Day 1 or early Day 2.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Elevate PIT OT need to first-round tier; OT competes with Simpson for pick 21.

insider_reports.summary: Seahawks enter the week with only 4 picks (32, 64, 96, 188) and are actively shopping No. 32 to stockpile picks. RB flagged as top SEA need.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: SEA trade_down_rate → high; RB need → high.

insider_reports.summary: League sources: Howie Roseman 'plotting to make a deal on draft weekend.' Greenard trade talks with Vikings lost steam but could be revisited. Eagles want proven talent and/or to move up in R1.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: PHI trade_up_rate elevated; PHI MAY skip EDGE if Greenard acquired, otherwise EDGE live at 23.

insider_reports.summary: A.J. Brown trade to Patriots 'still tracking' post-June 1 for cap split. Trade before June 1 would cost Eagles $43.4M dead cap.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Eagles NOT drafting Brown replacement this week. Patriots NOT adjusting draft posture for Brown.

insider_reports.summary: Giants now LESS likely to deal EDGE Thibodeaux after acquiring two top-10 picks (5 & 10) via the Dexter Lawrence trade. Thibodeaux set to play 2026 on $14.751M fifth-year option.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: NYG edge need demoted; DT need elevated post-Lawrence; both top-10 picks live.

insider_reports.summary: NFL Combine tests revealed cyst on spine — source of 2025 oblique pain. Nussmeier asymptomatic since pre-Senior Bowl; any future procedure is minimally invasive with 2-3 week recovery. Pelissero also: 'I don't think Ty Simpson gets out of the first half of Round 1.'
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Nussmeier stabilizes Day 2 (not free-fall). Simpson floor = R1 by a tier-1 insider.

insider_reports.summary: Trio report: A.J. Brown will NOT attend Eagles voluntary workouts starting Monday; Eagles/Patriots deal still tracking for on-or-after June 1.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Reinforces deferred-trade scenario; neutral on draft picks this week.

insider_reports.source: Rapoport (NFL Network) via Pelissero on GMFB
insider_reports.summary: Steelers have NOT received word from Aaron Rodgers and do not expect to before the draft. Rodgers decision will NOT come before Thursday.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: PIT draft plan will be built assuming Rodgers-uncertainty; raises Simpson/Allar @ 21 branch weight.

insider_reports.summary: Breer: 'A consensus seems to be crystallizing that Texas Tech EDGE David Bailey will be the second pick.' Conflicting team-source quotes on Bailey vs Reese; Jets canceled a private Bailey visit (could be smokescreen).
insider_reports.impact_on_model: NYJ @ 2 still a two-man race; Bailey consensus favorite but Reese live, visit-cancellation is a smoke flag.

insider_reports.summary: Breer: ARI, TEN, NYG, CLE, WAS all exploring deals to move down — problem is finding buyers. Reluctance to move high 2027 picks (per Schultz) compounds it.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Boost trade_down_rate for these 5 teams, but DAMP conversion probability (buyers scarce). Net: more calls, fewer actual moves.

insider_reports.player: Kadyn Proctor / Monroe Freeling / Caleb Lomu
insider_reports.summary: Breer: second-10 picks will see an OT run — Proctor going higher than expected; Freeling (UGA) and Lomu (Utah) carry real LT potential.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Elevate OT tier for picks 12-25; PIT, NE (second R1), NYG-at-10, DAL, PHI, MIA all sensitive.

insider_reports.summary: Schultz: 2026 expected to be 'one of the more trade-heavy drafts in recent memory.' Multiple top-10 teams want to move down; teams reluctant to surrender high 2027 picks is slowing deals.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Global trade_rate +, but trade_success_rate - due to pricing friction.

insider_reports.summary: Spytek: 'We've gotten a few calls, and those teams know where they stand.' Raiders staying at No. 1. Strong implication Mendoza is the pick.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: LV @ 1 Mendoza → LOCK (P > 0.95). Zero out LV trade_down_rate for this cycle.

insider_reports.summary: Berry: goal at No. 6 is 'maximizing the asset' — working trade down, trade up, and trade-for-veteran scenarios up to going on the clock.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: CLE posture confirmed tripartite; increase variance on CLE @ 6 outcome.

insider_reports.summary: Pelissero: 'I don't think Ty Simpson gets out of the first half of Round 1.' Simpson top-30 visits: NYJ, ARI, CLE, PIT. Arizona +130 betting favorite; Jets +225.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Simpson R1 floor confirmed by tier-1 insider. ARI, NYJ (second pick 39 likely too late) = bidders; PIT contingent; CLE wild card.

insider_reports.summary: Jets canceled a private Bailey visit this week — 'could mean something, or smokescreen.' Dueling team-exec quotes on Bailey vs Reese: 'Reese's body isn't ready' vs. 'I'd go Reese because of versatility.'
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Treat as smoke; do not collapse NYJ @ 2 onto Bailey. Maintain Reese as live alternative.

insider_reports.summary: 'Arizona Cardinals hold the keys to how the rest of R1 unfolds.' Ossenfort known for draft-day deals; no definitive board read.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: ARI @ 3 = highest-variance pick in top-5; keep both Love-pick and trade-down branches at meaningful mass.

insider_reports.summary: Dexter Lawrence trade to Bengals finalized; Giants now own picks 5 and 10. Bengals added 1-year $28M extension through 2028.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: NYG picks: add 10. CIN: remove 10, add DT-solved.

insider_reports.summary: Profile of USC S Kamari Ramsey as a potential Day-2 Giants target.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Minor NYG Day-2 signal; no R1 implication.

insider_reports.summary: Beat case for PHI to trade up from No. 23 ahead of NYG/CAR/DAL/PIT who could swipe an OT. Aligns with Roseman 'selective strike' pattern.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Reinforces PHI trade_up_rate. OT is the likely target position.

insider_reports.summary: Most-cited framework: CLE sends pick 32 to SEA receiving 39+70+149. Schneider rarely stays at 4 picks.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Codify CLE-SEA 32-for-39+70+149 as a live trade scenario.

insider_reports.summary: Front offices view Highsmith as likelier-to-be-moved than Nick Herbig if Steelers deal an edge.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Minor — affects PIT's willingness to draft a rotational EDGE on Day 2, not R1 posture.

insider_reports.summary: Multiple teams pinging Jets about WR Garrett Wilson. GM Darren Mougey willing to listen on strong offer.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Low direct impact on R1 order; minor P(NYJ WR pick) reduction at 39.

insider_reports.summary: Bears-Bagent trade rumors cooled (Chicago not a QB suitor this week); ARI remains Simpson destination at top of R2 or late R1 reach.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Remove CHI QB latent need; ARI Simpson contingency live.

insider_reports.summary: Additional Schefter color: Browns exploring veteran-trade scenarios alongside trade-down/up. Reinforces Berry 'maximize asset' posture.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: No new directional change; confirms tripartite posture.

insider_reports.summary: Eagles re-emerged as suitors for MIN EDGE Greenard; discussions could reignite during draft weekend. Vikings want premium Day-2 pick.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: PHI-MIN Greenard trade branch live; MIN draft plan sensitive to whether deal fires.

insider_reports.summary: Cowboys extended K Aubrey 4yr/$28M. Indirect signal DAL prioritizing veteran retention; not drafting a kicker Day 3.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Negligible — remove tiny K probability from DAL Day 3.

pick_locks_summary.note: Trade-down still a real branch; if hold → Love
Removed — Dexter Lawrence trade delivered pick 10 to Bengals who then shipped it elsewhere? No — CIN RECEIVED pick 10. Hold.
pick_locks_summary.correction: CIN gained pick 10 from NYG via Lawrence trade per Pelissero 4/19. Both NYG (5) and CIN (10) now in top-10.

trade_scenarios_new_or_updated.framework: KC 9 + future → 3 or 4 for top EDGE (Bailey/Reese)
trade_scenarios_new_or_updated.status: reported by Schefter 4/20, Veach public signals active Thursday

trade_scenarios_new_or_updated.framework: Roseman trying to jump ahead for an OT
PHI sends premium Day-2 pick (54 or 68) + Day-3 for Greenard
trade_scenarios_new_or_updated.status: reignites on draft weekend per Schefter 4/20

trade_scenarios_new_or_updated.framework: Most cited: CLE 32-for-39+70+149 (CLE moving up from 39 into 32)
NYG sends Dexter Lawrence to CIN for pick 10 + Lawrence 1yr/$28M ext
ARI moves off 3 if offer meets value
trade_scenarios_new_or_updated.status: exploratory calls only (Schefter 4/20); Ossenfort willing to deal

prospects_sliding.reason: Durability / hamstring soft-tissue history — missed Combine and pro day
ACL medical file is sticking point despite 4.39 pro day
If Bailey/Love/Styles go 2-3-4, Reese lands at 5 (NYG). Tier-1 conditional slide.
Breer: 'going higher than some expected' — OT run in picks 12-25

team_shuffles.change: Acquired pick 10 (Lawrence trade). DT need elevated. Thibodeaux staying.
Added DT Lawrence (solved DT need); paid premium (pick 10 + 1yr/$28M ext); draft focus now skill/LB/secondary.
OT need elevated to R1-tier (Broderick Jones neck setback). QB branch (Simpson) still live pending Rodgers.
Not replacing A.J. Brown in draft (deferred trade). Actively plotting trade-up AND Greenard EDGE acquisition.
Bagent QB trade rumors cooled — CHI not a QB suitor this week.
Kicker Aubrey extended; no K drafted Day 3.
Raised P(Love @ 3). Still willing to trade down but no advanced offer.
Berry 'maximize the asset' — trade-down, trade-up, and veteran-acquisition ALL live at 6.
Shopping No. 32; RB confirmed top need.

top_10_highest_impact_findings: 1. Raiders LOCK at Mendoza @ 1 (Spytek presser, 4/20) — collapse LV P(Mendoza) to ~0.96; zero trade-down.
2. Cardinals 'growing chatter' on Jeremiyah Love @ 3 (Schefter 4/20) — RB top-3 scenario is now the modal outcome for ARI if they hold.
3. Schefter 4/20 conditional cascade: if NYJ→Bailey, ARI→Love, TEN→Styles, then Reese slides to NYG @ 5. Encode this as the baseline top-5.
4. Dexter Lawrence → Bengals for pick 10 COMPLETED (4/19). NYG holds 5 AND 10. CIN removes DT need, loses a R1 pick.
5. Pittsburgh OT need elevated to R1-tier after Broderick Jones neck setback (Schefter 4/20) — competes with Simpson QB branch at pick 21 contingent on Rodgers non-answer by Thursday.
6. Pelissero: 'Ty Simpson won't get out of the first half of R1' — tier-1 floor for Simpson. ARI (+130 betting fav) and NYJ (+225) the bidders; PIT contingent.
7. Howie Roseman 'plotting a deal on draft weekend' (Schefter 4/20) — two live branches: (a) trade up from 23 for OT, (b) Greenard EDGE acquisition from MIN. Both raise PHI variance.
8. Nussmeier's spinal-cyst cause diagnosed, asymptomatic (Pelissero 4/20) — prevents free-fall, stabilizes at Day 2. Saints @ 8 and Steelers @ 21 are NOT floors anymore; Day 2 is.
9. NYG Thibodeaux NOT being traded (Rapoport 4/20) — edge supply tightens for any team planning to trade for a vet EDGE; Greenard and Highsmith remain the names.

10. Five teams (ARI, TEN, NYG, CLE, WAS) exploring trade-down but buyers scarce (Breer 4/20 + Schultz 4/19-20) — trade RATES up, trade SUCCESS down. Net effect: more rumor noise, fewer completed R1 deals than supply would suggest.

edits.source_note: 4/20: Spytek presser explicit — teams 'know where they stand.'

edits.qb_urgency: keep moderate — Simpson only at top of R2/late-R1 reach

edits.trade_down_rate: 0.25 (listed as down-mover but no advanced offers)

edits.veteran_trade_branch: add; non-zero probability of trading pick for a vet

edits.qb_urgency: keep contingent; Rodgers silence = Simpson branch @ 21 live

edits.roster_needs.WR: do NOT add — Brown trade deferred, they're fine for 2026
edits.edge_branch: add Greenard-acquisition alt path (P ~ 0.25 of firing)

edits.trade_posture: Greenard potentially moved for premium Day-2 pick
edits.contingent_edge_replacement: flag — if Greenard goes, MIN drafts EDGE at 24

edits.trade_up_rate: raise to 0.25 (Schefter 4/20 contacted ARI and TEN)

edits.P(Bailey @ 2): ~0.55 (consensus crystallizing per Breer, but visit-cancellation flag)

edits.A.J. Brown acquisition: deferred post-June-1 — do NOT change draft posture for it

edits.trade_down_rate: raise modestly — listed among 5 teams exploring down-move per Breer 4/20

explicitly_no_new_intel_in_window: Jeremy Fowler (ESPN) — no standalone 4/19-4/20 report; folded into Schefter column.
Mike Garafolo — only co-bylined on NFL.com Monday buzz (captured above).
Peter King (FMIA) — next FMIA preview posted earlier in week; no 4/19 or 4/20 standalone.
Dianna Russini (The Athletic) — resigned from The Athletic recently (Vrabel photo investigation fallout); no draft reporting in window.
Josina Anderson — no dated 4/19-4/20 posts surfaced in public indexing.
Jay Glazer (FOX) — no dated 4/19-4/20 posts surfaced.

Local beats: BAL, BUF, CAR, DEN, DET, GB, HOU, IND, JAX, KC (beyond Schefter), LAC, LAR, MIA, NO (Nussmeier coverage only), SF, TB, ATL, TEN (beyond Schefter) — no net-new reporting dated 4/19 or 4/20.
caveats: Dianna Russini has exited The Athletic; treat any April reporting attributed to her as pre-departure legacy unless confirmed.
All 'trade-down exploring' intel (ARI/TEN/NYG/CLE/WAS) reflects LISTENING, not CLOSED deals. Weight accordingly.
The NYJ visit-cancellation on Bailey is explicitly flagged by CBS/Breer as potentially a smokescreen — do NOT collapse NYJ onto Reese based on it.
Rodgers decision is the single biggest pending variable for PIT; model must branch.
